perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A woman with long dark hair, wearing a black top, holds a round chocolate-covered treat in a clear plastic container up to the camera with a surprised and excited expression. (2) She removes the treat from the container, showing its spherical shape, and then displays a cross-section of a similar treat showing a green pistachio filling. (3) She holds the half-eaten treat, showing the gooey green interior, and speaks directly to the camera with varying facial expressions ranging from curiosity to mild disappointment. (4) She pours a white liquid (milk) from a carton into a small floral-patterned bowl. (5) She dips the remaining portion of the chocolate mochi into the milk and takes a bite, looking thoughtful while chewing. (6) She continues to eat and talk, gesturing with her hands while comparing the store-bought item to her own expectations.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, rhythmic pop music with a moderate tempo begins. A young female voice speaks enthusiastically in Korean. (2) The music continues as the speaker's tone shifts to include a playful, slightly exaggerated exclamation (imitating her mother saying "Crazy!"). (3) The background music shifts to a lighter, more whimsical pizzicato string-style track. Sound of a crisp bite and chewing sounds (ASMR style) are audible. (4) The speaker continues narrating her taste test in a steady, conversational tone, occasionally emphasizing certain words with a higher pitch. (5) Sound of liquid pouring smoothly into a bowl. (6) The music remains in the background as she gives her final verdict, her voice sounding reflective and humorous, ending with a final enthusiastic statement.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: "韓國爆紅這個！" (Red hot in Korea!). Tone: Excited hook. (2) Decorative Text: "杜拜巧克力麻糬餅" (Dubai Chocolate Mochi Cake). Tone: Informative product name. (3) Functional Text: "台幣220NT" (220 NTD). Tone: Factual pricing. (4) Decorative Text: "媽：瘋了！" (Mom: Crazy!). Tone: Humorous reaction. (5) Functional Text: "口感很Q彈確實..." (The texture is indeed very chewy...). Tone: Evaluative review. (6) Decorative Text: "下次乾脆我自己做看看？" (Maybe I'll just try making it myself next time?). Tone: Humorous/Suggestive.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro/Hype -> Price/Background -> Tasting/Texture Analysis -> Milk Pairing -> Final Verdict/Comparison

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 female main creator appearing in a talking-head format.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: Young woman with long, straight black hair, wearing a simple black long-sleeved shirt and blue jeans.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: An indoor living or dining area with wooden flooring, a white chair, and a kitchen area visible in the soft-focus background.

audio_production_style.audioTransition: Cross-fade between music tracks; hard cuts for vocal edits.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Product Info -> Sensory Evaluation -> Conclusion
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To provide an honest, critical review of a viral food trend (Dubai Chocolate Mochi). The creator balances the excitement of the trend with a realistic assessment of the product's value and taste, eventually suggesting that her own homemade version might be superior.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The creator criticizes the high price and the mediocre flavor, which is inconsistent with a paid endorsement.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Fast-paced editing style with frequent text overlays and expressive facial reactions common in K-vlog food reviews.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video leverages the 'Dubai Chocolate' trend which was highly viral in Korea and Taiwan during this period, focusing on the mochi variant.
